_header.file_role: provenance sidecar for llama33_70b.json (E1 anchor fleet)

S1.name: meta-llama/llama-models (official Meta GitHub), models/sku_list.py, llama3_3_70b_instruct arch_args (byte-identical to llama3_1_70b entry)

S3.name: The Llama 3 Herd of Models, arXiv:2407.21783v3, Table 3 (70B column: 80 layers / 8192 dim / 28672 FFN / 64 heads / 8 KV heads)

S4.name: meta-llama/llama-models, models/llama3_3/MODEL_CARD.md (70B, GQA, 128k context, 15T+ tokens, release 2024-12-06)

ffn_dim.source: S2 official formula: int(2*(4*8192)/3)=21845; int(1.3*21845)=28398; round up to multiple 4096 -> 28672; cross-check S3 Table 3 (FFN Dimension 28,672)

rope_scaling.value: llama3-type, factor 8, 8192 -> 131072; NOT representable in AC schema 0.3, encoded as method none + original_max_position 8192

tied_embeddings.source: S1/S2 (Llama 3 reference implementation uses separate tok_embeddings and output projections)

total_params_b.source: computed with AC parameter ledger from S1/S3 dims; consistent with S4 model class (70B)

notes: Llama 3.3 70B was released only as an Instruct variant; the base architecture is identical to Llama 3.1 70B (S1 entries are byte-identical). Serving anchor uses meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct; requires HF_TOKEN with accepted Llama 3.3 Community License on the rented node.

meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct on Hugging Face is license-gated (HTTP 401 on raw config.json without a token), so the gated config.json was NOT used; fields come from Meta's official GitHub repository and the arXiv paper.
